top_signals: Israel strikes central Beirut (Bashoura) — 6 killed, building levelled. Displacement reaches 900K+
Iran Hormuz traffic nearly doubled — maritime intel shows partial blockade de-escalation
Iran cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv for Larijani killing — 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets
Kent resigns saying intel 'was a lie' — Senate hearing TODAY, Gabbard testifying

Trump struggles to build Hormuz coalition — Europe rejects deployment demands

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 22): ZERO de-escalation signals in active war theaters. Iran escalates with cluster warheads. US escalates with bunker busters. Pakistan kills 408 in Kabul. Israel expands Lebanon ops. Putin-Trump call TODAY is wildcard — Ukraine focus, not ME de-escalation. Senate Intel hearing TODAY — narrative inflection, not battlefield inflection.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes central Beirut — 6 killed, 24 wounded in Bashoura neighbourhood
latest_news.text: Israeli airstrike levels building in Bashoura, central Beirut. 6 killed, 24 wounded. IDF also strikes Tyre (weapons storage) and Al-Qard Al-Hassan (Hezbollah finance). Hezbollah fires dozens rockets at Israel. Displacement now 900K+.

latest_news.headline: Iran allowing more ships through Strait of Hormuz — traffic nearly doubled
latest_news.text: Maritime intelligence shows number of ships transiting Strait of Hormuz has nearly doubled in recent days. Partial de-escalation of effective blockade. Iran signals openness to safe passage.

latest_news.headline: Iran cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv — 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets struck as revenge for Larijani
latest_news.text: IRGC says missiles hit 100+ military/security targets in Israel as revenge for Larijani assassination. 2 killed near Tel Aviv.

latest_news.headline: Kent resigns saying war intel 'was a lie' — Gabbard testifies at Senate Intel
latest_news.text: NCTC Director Kent resigned: Iran 'posed no imminent threat.' Gabbard testifying before Senate Intel defending Trump. Political earthquake.

latest_news.headline: Gulf states intercept fresh overnight barrage — Bahrain, Qatar, UAE, Saudi Arabia
latest_news.text: All four Gulf states report intercepting Iranian missiles and drones overnight. Continued Iranian bombardment.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 22, 10:04 UTC) — War Day 22. MIXED SIGNALS: (1) Israel intensifies Lebanon — central Beirut strike kills 6, 900K displaced; (2) Iran Hormuz traffic nearly doubled — partial de-escalation; (3) Iran retaliates for Larijani with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv; (4) Kent resignation political earthquake, Senate hearing ongoing; (5) Gulf states intercept fresh barrages. Hormuz reopening is first positive signal in days. Oil ~$102.
